creator: Microsoft
description: Windows XP Starter Edition. This version of Windows XP is pretty dulled down and doesn't have a lot of functionality. Only 3 programs can be run at once, and it doesn't have a lot of customizability. Product key is in the attached text file, phone activation required as usual.
